ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Price change of the stock */,
  "p_change" REAL /* Percentage price change of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on the stock for the day */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio of the stock if applicable */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock exchange */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moving_averages" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the moving average data */,
  "ma5" REAL /* 5-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "ma10" REAL /* 10-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "ma20" REAL /* 20-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "ma50" REAL /* 50-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "ma100" REAL /* 100-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "ma200" REAL /* 200-day moving average of the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "volume_moving_averages" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the moving average data */,
  "v_ma5" REAL /* 5-day moving average of the trading volume */,
  "v_ma10" REAL /* 10-day moving average of the trading volume */,
  "v_ma20" REAL /* 20-day moving average of the trading volume */,
  "v_ma50" REAL /* 50-day moving average of the trading volume */,
  "v_ma100" REAL /* 100-day moving average of the trading volume */,
  "v_ma200" REAL /* 200-day moving average of the trading volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
